summary: Classified the PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is planned, one already-merged PR is kept closed, and all remaining open PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review.

Independent candidate appears viable but requires normal maintainer review outside this non-mutating plan.
Already merged; no action is needed or valid in this cluster.
Independent migration candidate is blocked by conflict/proof, not closable as duplicate or low-signal in this shard.
Independent feature PR has useful code and passing evidence, but merge is blocked by plan mode/frontmatter and maintainer review is still required.
Independent telemetry candidate needs proof/maintainer review, not closure or merge from this shard.
Substantial independent fix appears promising but must remain in normal maintainer review; merge is blocked by frontmatter.
Independent fix candidate should stay open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Independent compatibility fix appears scoped and useful, but this plan cannot merge and has no close rationale.
Independent provider UX feature needs proof and maintainer review; no security routing or closure is warranted from the hydrated artifact.
Broad independent feature/fix candidate needs proof and maintainer review, not automated closeout.
Draft/conflicted independent provider PR should remain open for author/maintainer work; closure is not allowed or justified.

Keep open as an independent low-signal docs candidate because closure is disabled and no duplicate canonical is hydrated.
